stackRefinements.cli: Zero-dependency Node >= 20 ESM CLI (node: builtins only — node:fs, node:test, node:assert); ESLint configured via .eslintrc.json but eslint is not a declared dependency

ordering: Single layer (cli) with zero internal edges — no provider/consumer ordering signal; any task dispatches directly to the cli layer. deriveDispatchOrder input is empty.
gaps: eslint is referenced by .eslintrc.json but absent from package.json dependencies/devDependencies and the lockfile — lint tooling presumably expected globally or via npx; lint command unconfirmed
